label: gui-nav-panels
description: Wire the sidebar nav so the design dashboard switches live panel state from repo-backed data instead of visual-only clicks.

label: gui-dag-task-details
description: Make DAG rows open live task details, dependencies, allowed paths, and verification reasons from repo state.

label: gui-bootstrap-step-details
description: Make bootstrap rows open live step details and status sourced from repo state.

label: gui-repo-structure-details
description: Make repo structure rows clickable with live detail panels backed by actual repo paths and state.

label: gui-vector-phase-details
description: Make vector phase rows open repo-backed phase details instead of acting like decorative cards.

label: gui-memory-file-open
description: Make memory file rows open real repo file details and context instead of static labels.

label: gui-export-jsonl
description: Wire the JSONL export button to a real Flask endpoint that emits repo-backed export output.

label: gui-export-alpaca
description: Wire the Alpaca export button to a real Flask endpoint that emits canonical dataset output.

label: gui-export-sharegpt
description: Wire the ShareGPT export button to a real Flask endpoint that emits conversation-format data.

label: gui-export-steering
description: Wire the steering-only export button to a real Flask endpoint that emits steering traces only.

label: gui-repo-freeze-toggle
description: Wire the repo freeze toggle to a real Flask control endpoint so the dashboard can mutate live freeze state.

label: gui-spawn-loop-controls
description: Wire the spawn loop controls to a real Flask control plane so start, pause, and related actions work from the GUI.

label: gui-audit-log-details
description: Make the audit log panel open detailed repo-backed audit events instead of a single summary card.

label: gui-stray-monitor-details
description: Make the stray monitor panel open detailed repo-backed stray event history and diagnostics.

label: gui-readiness-tracker-live
description: Replace the static readiness tracker rows with canonical repo-backed readiness rendering.
